business_capability: Return a response only when retrieved context is current, authorized, attributable to an authoritative source version, and consistent with the applicable policy.

failure_semantics.stale_index: Return a controlled non-answer before vector retrieval or model invocation when the authoritative source version exceeds the indexed version.
failure_semantics.unauthorized_context: Reject retrieval outside the caller tenant and document authorization boundary.
failure_semantics.missing_provenance: Do not serve a grounded answer when source identity and version cannot be established.
failure_semantics.policy_conflict: Return a controlled non-answer or escalation when the generated claim conflicts with the deployed policy.
failure_semantics.trust_recovery: Serve the response only after ingestion, authorization, provenance, and policy controls all pass.
